scenes.why: contract-validation run anchored on an archived explaino_joy state. The sidecars stress transcendental Newton ladders and compose-inside-iterate behavior on the shipped lambda/composition surface, but this manifest is not evidence of a newly discovered mathematical view.

sidecars.notes: Newton for exp(z)-1. Roots repeat at 2*pi*i*k, so the ladder runs up and down the imaginary axis and tests transcendental Newton without adding a new intrinsic.
Newton for sin(z)=0. Roots repeat at pi*k along the real axis, giving a second infinite-root ladder with poles from cos(z) in the denominator.
compose(cos(z), sin(z)) inside iterate. This is the direct lambda/composition stress case because the loop body itself is a composed function rather than a plain polynomial step.
